source_article: "Ukrinform,2026-05-10,A resident of the Kherson region, who was attacked by a drone this morning, died in hospital."
source_headline: A resident of the Kherson region, who was attacked by a drone this morning, died in hospital.
where_description:
A 62-year-old woman who was injured in a Russian drone attack in Komyshany, Kherson region, died in the hospital this morning.
This was reported by the head of the Kherson MVA Yaroslav Shanko in  Telegram , Ukrinform reports.

"A 62-year-old woman, who was attacked by Russian terrorists from a drone in Komyshany at around 6.20, died despite all the efforts of doctors ," the report says.

Shanko noted that the victim was hospitalized with a mine-explosive injury, amputation of her left arm and leg, and shrapnel wounds to her torso.
